Off Calendar Apr-03-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Jaymee Faith Sagisi, Esq. of Greenstein & McDonald, (415-773-1240x302).
No other appearance.

Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: Defendant's Demurrer to Complaint is OVERRULED. Plaintiff has pled sufficient facts to support the Second and Seventh causes of action. Order is signed in open court. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Olopernes, Not Reported, D501.

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Mar-04-2015 Continued To Apr-03-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT YUET KWONG's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is continued to April 3, 2015. Moving party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.6C and provide courtesy copy of the operative complaint to department 501 no later than March 13, 2015 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D501)
